name: Tool Research
description: Uses the approved Agentic tool runner first, then reviews the tool result and writes a final answer. Useful when the task may need workspace, shell, Git, or internet tools.

nodes.title: Research
nodes.prompt: Use approved tools to gather the missing facts or project context. Keep tool use focused and summarize what changed, what was found, and what still needs review.

nodes.title: Review
nodes.prompt: Review the tool result for usefulness, gaps, and risk. Return JSON with status, summary, and findings.

nodes.title: Answer
nodes.prompt: Answer the user using the tool result and reviewer notes. Mention any remaining uncertainty briefly.
